top_themes.name: Treatment Quality
affected_clinics: CRGH (The Centre for Reproductive and Genetic Health)
Kensington International Clinic - La Maison Medicale
top_themes.description: Treatment Quality is the most recurring theme, appearing in the top themes of nearly all clinics, indicating its critical importance to patients.

top_themes.name: Staff Attitude
affected_clinics: CRGH (The Centre for Reproductive and Genetic Health)
top_themes.description: Staff Attitude is another highly recurring theme, reflecting the significant impact of staff behavior and interaction on patient experience.

top_themes.name: Communication
top_themes.description: Communication is a common theme, highlighting the importance of clear and effective information exchange between clinics and patients.

top_themes.name: Booking & Admin
affected_clinics: CRGH (The Centre for Reproductive and Genetic Health)
top_themes.description: Booking & Admin processes are frequently mentioned, suggesting that administrative efficiency is a key factor in patient satisfaction.

top_themes.name: Doctor / Consultant
top_themes.description: The role and quality of doctors or consultants are significant themes, emphasizing their influence on patient trust and outcomes.

top_themes.name: Billing & Invoicing
top_themes.description: Billing & Invoicing is a notable theme, indicating that transparency and fairness in financial matters are important to patients.

top_themes.name: Value for Money
affected_clinics: Kensington International Clinic - La Maison Medicale
top_themes.description: Value for Money is mentioned by several clinics, reflecting patient concerns about cost-effectiveness and affordability.

top_themes.name: Waiting Times
top_themes.description: Waiting Times are a concern for some patients, indicating that delays can negatively impact their experience.

top_themes.name: Aftercare
top_themes.description: Aftercare is rarely mentioned, suggesting it may not be a primary focus in patient feedback.

top_themes.name: Facilities
top_themes.description: Facilities are seldom highlighted, indicating that physical environment may be less critical compared to other factors.

overall_summary: The analysis reveals that Treatment Quality and Staff Attitude are the most prevalent themes across London gynaecology and fertility clinics, underscoring their importance in patient satisfaction. Communication and Booking & Admin also feature prominently, reflecting the need for efficient processes and clear information exchange. Other themes like Doctor / Consultant, Billing & Invoicing, and Value for Money, while less frequent, still play significant roles in shaping patient experiences. Themes such as Waiting Times, Aftercare, and Facilities are mentioned less often, suggesting they are secondary concerns for most patients.
